rulesEtiquette: All visitors must cover their heads before entering the prayer hall. Scarves are available at the entrance if you don't have one.
Please remove your shoes before entering the main building. Shoe racks are provided at the entrance.
Tobacco products and alcohol are strictly prohibited on the Gurudwara premises.
Please dress modestly. Legs and shoulders should be covered. Long pants or skirts and shirts with sleeves are appropriate.

openingTimings.sundaySpecial: Weekly Kirtan Darbar: 11:00 AM - 1:00 PM followed by Langar

howToReach: U-Bahn: Take U8 to Pankstraße station (5 min walk)
Tram: M1 or 50 to Wollankstraße/Soldiner Straße

items.title: Vaisakhi Celebration 2026
items.description: Join us for the grand celebration of Vaisakhi, commemorating the formation of the Khalsa.

items.title: Gurpurab - Guru Nanak Dev Ji
items.description: Celebrate the birth anniversary of Guru Nanak Dev Ji with kirtan, prayers, and langar.

items.title: Weekly Kirtan Darbar
items.description: Weekly congregational singing of hymns from Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji followed by langar.

items.title: Asa Di Var - Morning Prayer
items.description: Daily morning prayers with recitation of Asa Di Var.

items.title: Rehras Sahib - Evening Prayer
items.description: Daily evening prayers with Rehras Sahib.

items.title: Gurmukhi Learning Session
items.description: Learn to read and write Gurmukhi script. All ages welcome.

items.title: Monthly Sangat Gathering
items.description: Monthly congregation gathering for prayer, discussion, and fellowship.

items.title: Diwali Celebration
items.description: Join the community for prayers, kirtan, and celebration on Diwali.

cards.title: Photo Gallery
cards.description: Browse through albums organized by events, festivals, and community activities. Relive the beautiful moments from our celebrations.

cards.title: Videos
cards.description: Watch recordings of Kirtan, educational sessions, event highlights, and special programs from our Gurudwara.

cards.title: Live Kirtan
cards.description: Listen to live Kirtan streaming from our Gurudwara. Join us virtually for daily prayers and weekend programs.

updates.title: Vaisakhi 2026 Photo Album
updates.description: 145 new photos from our recent Vaisakhi celebration have been added to the gallery.

updates.title: New Educational Video Series
updates.description: Watch our new Gurbani Explained series to learn more about Sikh teachings and philosophy.

history.heroSubtitle: The journey of Singh Sabha Gurudwara Berlin

sections.title: Foundation and Early Years
sections.body: Singh Sabha Gurudwara Berlin was established to serve the growing Sikh community in Berlin and surrounding areas. Our Gurudwara has been a beacon of spiritual guidance, cultural preservation, and community service.

sections.title: Growth and Development
sections.body: Over the years, we have expanded our services to meet the needs of our diverse community. From humble beginnings, we have grown into a vibrant center that welcomes thousands of visitors annually.

sections.title: Community Service
sections.body: Throughout our history, we have remained committed to the Sikh principles of seva (selfless service), equality, and compassion. Our langar (community kitchen) has served countless meals, and our doors remain open to all, regardless of background or belief.

sections.title: Looking Forward
sections.body: As we continue our journey, we remain dedicated to preserving our rich heritage while adapting to serve future generations. We are committed to being a place of spiritual growth, cultural celebration, and community unity.

mission.heroDescription: To provide a welcoming spiritual home where individuals can connect with Waheguru, practice Sikh values, and serve the community with compassion and humility.

cards.title: Spiritual Growth
cards.description: Foster spiritual development through daily prayers, kirtan, and the teachings of Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji.

cards.title: Community Service
cards.description: Embody the principle of seva through langar, volunteer programs, and support for those in need.

cards.title: Education
cards.description: Provide educational programs for all ages to preserve Sikh heritage, language, and values.

cards.title: Inclusivity
cards.description: Welcome people of all backgrounds and create a space of equality, respect, and unity.

coreValues.title: Naam Japna
coreValues.description: Meditation on God's name and remembering the Divine in all aspects of life.

coreValues.title: Kirat Karni
coreValues.description: Earning an honest living through hard work and integrity.

coreValues.title: Vand Chakna
coreValues.description: Sharing with others and contributing to the welfare of the community.

committee.heroSubtitle: Meet the dedicated team serving our community
committee.intro: Our Management Committee consists of elected volunteers who dedicate their time and effort to ensure the smooth operation of the Gurudwara and service to the community.
committee.ctaDescription: Committee positions are elected positions. Elections are held annually according to our constitution. If you're interested in serving on the committee, please reach out to us.

governance.heroSubtitle: Transparency and accountability in our operations
governance.structureIntro: Singh Sabha Gurudwara Berlin (e.V.) operates as a registered non-profit association (eingetragener Verein) under German law. Our governance structure ensures democratic decision-making and accountability to our community members.

structureBlocks.title: General Assembly
structureBlocks.body: The highest decision-making body, consisting of all registered members. The General Assembly elects the Management Committee and makes decisions on major organizational matters.

structureBlocks.title: Management Committee
structureBlocks.body: Elected by the General Assembly, the Management Committee oversees day-to-day operations, implements decisions, and ensures compliance with our constitution and German law.

structureBlocks.title: Advisory Board
structureBlocks.body: Provides guidance on religious and cultural matters, ensuring that our activities align with Sikh principles and traditions.

governance.financialDescription: We are committed to complete transparency in our financial operations. All donations and expenses are recorded and audited annually. Our financial reports are available to all members and published in our annual reports.
governance.taxDescription: Singh Sabha Gurudwara Berlin (e.V.) is a registered charitable organization in Germany. Donations are tax-deductible. We provide donation receipts for tax purposes.
